current_commit_message: replace wildcard imports to explicit to avoid importing imports
restructure project move inspect utils into reflection module
raise requirements to python 3.9 + bump to 0.0.3
Make resolve headers/keys lenient so headers can use any preferred casing
Add backdated support for Python 3.7 so it's supported in jupyter.org and Google colab notebooks
Changes to support running the client under future annotations
Change to use /api + add set_base_path to change to use custom base path
Wrap urljoin for different behavior when it comes to base_url usage.
add support for compact json serialization to to_jsno
Improve support for sending complex DTO types with uploaded files
Fix serialization of complex types with file_upload
